reason: Prostate cancer cannot be billed with pregnancy/childbirth codes
Male genital condition cannot be billed with pregnancy codes
Antenatal care and contraceptive management should not be billed together
Type 1 and Type 2 diabetes should not be billed simultaneously
Liveborn infant and outcome of delivery should not be billed together on same claim
Multiple substance use disorders require separate claims
Acute MI and subsequent MI should not appear on same single-day claim
Superficial injury and drug poisoning are unlikely primary diagnoses together
